title: Display Files/Media in Calendar View
excerpt: I would like to see an option on the calendar view to turn on visibility of files/media that are uploaded against an item. That way when you see the calendar, you see the item and associated visuals with it. This would b…

posts.author: DanielleC (Danielle Caporale)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to see an option on the calendar view to turn on visibility of files/media that are uploaded against an item. That way when you see the calendar, you see the item and associated visuals with it. This would be particularly useful for content planning.
